presets.name: Block XML-RPC
presets.description: Blocks all requests to xmlrpc.php — common brute-force and DDoS amplification vector.

presets.name: Block PHP in Uploads
presets.description: Blocks requests to PHP files inside wp-content/uploads — prevents webshell execution.

presets.name: JS Challenge on wp-login.php
presets.description: Serves a JavaScript challenge on the login page to filter bots.

presets.name: Block Known Bad Bots
presets.description: Blocks common scanner and exploit user-agents.
presets.expression: (http.user_agent contains "Nuclei") or (http.user_agent contains "sqlmap") or (http.user_agent contains "Nmap") or (http.user_agent contains "zgrab") or (http.user_agent eq "")

presets.name: Block Extended Bad Bots
presets.description: Broader list of known scanner, scraper, and exploit user-agents not covered by the base preset.
presets.expression: (http.user_agent contains "WPScan") or (http.user_agent contains "nikto") or (http.user_agent contains "masscan") or (http.user_agent contains "Hydra") or (http.user_agent contains "dirbuster") or (http.user_agent contains "gobuster") or (http.user_agent contains "wfuzz") or (http.user_agent contains "acunetix") or (http.user_agent contains "nessus") or (http.user_agent contains "python-requests") or (http.user_agent contains "Go-http-client")

presets.name: Block Common Exploit Paths
presets.description: Blocks requests to sensitive paths that should never be publicly accessible.

presets.name: Block Author Enumeration
presets.description: Blocks ?author=N scans used to harvest WordPress usernames.

presets.name: Block External wp-cron.php
presets.description: Blocks public access to wp-cron.php — it should only be triggered by a server-side cron job.

presets.name: JS Challenge on REST API
presets.description: Challenges unauthenticated requests to /wp-json/* — useful if you don't need a public REST API.

presets.name: Block Image Hotlinking
presets.description: Blocks requests to images and media from external domains that are not your site. Update the hostname to match your domain.
presets.expression: (http.request.uri.path matches "\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif|webp|svg|mp4|webm)$") and (http.referer ne "") and (not http.referer contains "yourdomain.com")
